nodes.label: ZeroAvia
nodes.note: Hydrogen-electric powertrains (ZA600, ZA2000).

nodes.note: Hydrogen-electric propulsion; Britten-Norman Islander conversion.

nodes.note: Hydrogen combustion gas-turbine testing.

nodes.label: Airbus
nodes.note: ZEROe hydrogen concept; timeline revised in 2025 to the later 2030s.

nodes.label: easyJet
nodes.note: Airline; Hydrogen in Aviation member; hydrogen ground-test partner.

nodes.label: Britten-Norman
nodes.note: BN-2 Islander airframe used in Project Fresson.

nodes.label: Loganair
nodes.note: UK regional operator; regional decarbonisation partner.

nodes.label: Intelligent Energy
nodes.note: Hydrogen fuel-cell systems.

nodes.label: Orsted
nodes.note: Energy company; Hydrogen in Aviation member (green hydrogen supply).

nodes.label: Deloitte
nodes.note: Commercial and blueprint lead on Project NAPKIN.

nodes.label: UCL Air Transportation Systems Lab
nodes.note: Airline Behaviour Model; route/demand modelling on NAPKIN.

nodes.label: Cranfield University
nodes.note: Aerospace research; hydrogen integration (CH2i).

nodes.label: University of Southampton
nodes.note: NAPKIN research partner.

nodes.label: Heathrow Airport
nodes.note: Project NAPKIN lead.

nodes.label: London City Airport
nodes.note: NAPKIN partner.

nodes.label: Bristol Airport
nodes.note: Airside hydrogen refuelling trial (Project Acorn); Hydrogen in Aviation member.

nodes.label: Glasgow Airport
nodes.note: CPC Connected Airport Living Lab.

nodes.label: Highlands and Islands Airports
nodes.note: Sub-regional airport operator; NAPKIN partner.

nodes.label: Department for Transport
nodes.note: Jet Zero Strategy; funds ZEFI and the Jet Zero programme.

nodes.label: Aerospace Technology Institute
nodes.note: Funds aerospace propulsion R&D including FlyZero and hydrogen programmes.

nodes.label: UKRI Future Flight Challenge
nodes.note: Innovate UK / UKRI programme funding new aviation systems including NAPKIN and Fresson.

nodes.label: Jet Zero Council
nodes.note: Government-industry partnership on UK aviation decarbonisation.

nodes.label: Civil Aviation Authority
nodes.note: UK aviation regulator; hydrogen aerodrome safety.

nodes.label: Connected Places Catapult
nodes.note: Runs the Zero Emission Flight Infrastructure (ZEFI) programme.

nodes.label: Hydrogen in Aviation (HIA)
nodes.note: Industry alliance for hydrogen-powered aviation.

nodes.label: ISO 19880-1 (gaseous hydrogen fuelling)
nodes.note: Gaseous hydrogen fuelling station requirements.

nodes.label: ISO 13985 (liquid hydrogen fuel tanks)
nodes.note: Liquid hydrogen land-vehicle fuel tanks; reference for cryogenic LH2 handling.

nodes.label: CAA aerodrome hydrogen safety guidance
nodes.note: UK regulatory guidance for hydrogen at aerodromes.

nodes.label: Zero Emission Flight Infrastructure (ZEFI)
nodes.note: DfT-funded, CPC-led programme on airport hydrogen and electric infrastructure.

nodes.label: ATI FlyZero
nodes.note: 2021-2022 ATI study; concluded liquid hydrogen is the primary long-term zero-carbon aviation fuel.

nodes.label: Jet Zero Strategy
nodes.note: DfT 2022 strategy for net-zero UK aviation by 2050.

nodes.label: Project NAPKIN
nodes.note: Future Flight Challenge project; sub-regional zero-emission flight blueprint; Heathrow-led.

nodes.label: HyFlyer II
nodes.note: ZeroAvia hydrogen-electric flight demonstration project.

nodes.label: H2GEAR
nodes.note: GKN Aerospace hydrogen fuel-cell propulsion programme.

nodes.label: H2FlyGHT
nodes.note: GKN Aerospace cryogenic hydrogen and electric propulsion programme.

nodes.label: Project Fresson
nodes.note: Cranfield Aerospace Solutions hydrogen fuel-cell Islander conversion.

nodes.label: Project Acorn
nodes.note: easyJet-led airside hydrogen refuelling trial at Bristol Airport.

nodes.label: Green hydrogen electrolysis
nodes.note: PEM and alkaline commercial; SOEC emerging.

nodes.label: Hydrogen liquefaction and distribution
nodes.note: Industrial-scale exists; airport-scale distribution developing.

nodes.label: Liquid hydrogen cryogenic storage
nodes.note: Airframe and airport cryogenic integration in development.

nodes.label: Gaseous hydrogen storage
nodes.note: In use on sub-regional demonstrators.

nodes.label: Airside liquid hydrogen refuelling
nodes.note: First airside trials underway.

nodes.label: Hydrogen fuel-cell powertrain
nodes.note: Sub-regional demonstrators flying and ground-testing.

nodes.label: Hydrogen combustion gas turbine
nodes.note: Ground tests completed by engine makers.
